summary: Patch Hermes skill so go auto starts tool execution immediately
description: Update repo-local-agent-workflow skill so Hermes/Bertus treats go auto as a tool-execution mandate: run router/status/preflight/claim/verify and continue instead of replying with suggested commands.
acceptance: Skill contains an explicit no-command-spam rule and default tool-call train for go auto.
Skill says ask only for hard gates: credentials, destructive/public/payment, ambiguous target/outcome, or unsafe dirty overlap.
